shows: The shop's actual setup: a white canopy tent behind the Mobil gas station on Miramar Road, with a detailer hand-washing a black car and a Mobil-branded sign visible.

The business's own printed business card reading 'Professional Car Detail, Mobil Gas Station, (619) 581-5530' -- confirming this is the same business.
The shop's sandwich-board price sign listing hand wash, hand wash & wax, mini/interior/exterior/complete detail pricing and hours, at the same phone number.
